title: SENTINEL APEX — ShinyHunters Exploits Oracle PeopleSoft Zero-Day CVE-2026-35273 to Breach Univer
id: 9975bd17-e6d1-5dc2-b5c5-f92857cff578
status: experimental
description: |
    Detects exploitation attempts related to CVE-2026-35273 (Web Application).
    Generated by CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX v166.2.
    Severity: CRITICAL | Class: KEV_EXPLOIT
references:
    - https://intel.cyberdudebivash.com
    - https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-35273
author: CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX Detection Engineering
date: 2026/06/14
modified: 2026/06/14
tags:
    - attack.initial_access
logsource:
    category: network_connection
    product: generic
detection:
    selection:
        EventID:
            - 4625
            - 4648
            - 4728
        LogonType: 3
    condition: selection
falsepositives:
    - Legitimate administrative access
    - Service account activity
level: critical
items.kql_query:
// SENTINEL APEX — CVE-2026-35273 — Anomalous Activity Detection
// Product: Web Application | Generated: 2026-06-14T03:32:42Z
let lookback = 1d;
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(lookback)
| where EventID in (4625, 4648, 4728, 4740, 4776)
| summarize FailureCount = count(), DistinctTargets = dcount(TargetUserName)
    by IpAddress, bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
| where FailureCount > 10 or DistinctTargets > 5
| extend Severity = "MEDIUM", CVE = "CVE-2026-35273", RuleSource = "SENTINEL-APEX"
| order by TimeGenerated desc
items.suricata_rule: alert http $EXTERNAL_NET any -> $HTTP_SERVERS $HTTP_PORTS (msg:"SENTINEL-APEX CVE-2026-35273 Exploitation Attempt - KEV_EXPLOIT"; flow:established,to_server; content:"|90 90 90 90|"; rawbytes; threshold:type threshold, track by_src, count 3, seconds 60; classtype:web-application-attack; sid:5432136; rev:1; metadata:created_at 2026-06-14, source SENTINEL-APEX-v166.2;)

items.title: CVE-2026-47244: Netty is a network application framework for development of protocol servers and clients. Prior to versions 4.1.135.Fina
items.description: Netty is a network application framework for development of protocol servers and clients. Prior to versions 4.1.135.Final and 4.2.15.Final, DefaultHttp2Connection.DefaultEndpoint initialises maxActiveStreams/maxStreams to Integer.MAX_VALUE, and Http2Settings never inserts SETTINGS_MAX_CONCURRENT_STREAMS by default (Http2Settings.java:305-307 only clamps a user-supplied value). Unless the application explicitly calls initialSettings().maxConcurrentStreams(n), a Netty HTTP/2 server advertises no limit and enforces none locally. Each open stream allocates a DefaultStream object, PropertyMap slots, flow-controller state and IntObjectHashMap entry; with ~2^30 permissible odd stream IDs a single TCP connection can create hundreds of thousands of long-lived stream objects. This is also the precondition for CVE-2023-44487-style Rapid-Reset amplification, where the absence of a low concurrent cap multiplies backend work. Versions 4.1.135.Final and 4.2.15.Final patch the issue.
items.apex_ai_summary: [MEDIUM] CVE advisory. Risk score 5.3/10. Full APEX AI analysis available to Pro subscribers.

apex.ai_summary: [P3] CVE / Vulnerability - moderate severity (Risk 5.3/10). MITRE ATT&CK mapped: T1190 (1 technique). 7 indicators detected - upgrade to Pro for full IOC access. AI confidence: LOW (28%) - limited source data available.
apex.recommended_action: STANDARD PRIORITY - Schedule patch within 7 days. Deploy detection rules. Monitor SIEM for related indicators.

items.kql_query:
// SENTINEL APEX — CVE-2026-10520 — Anomalous Activity Detection
// Product: Web Application | Generated: 2026-06-14T03:32:42Z
let lookback = 1d;
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(lookback)
| where EventID in (4625, 4648, 4728, 4740, 4776)
| summarize FailureCount = count(), DistinctTargets = dcount(TargetUserName)
    by IpAddress, bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
| where FailureCount > 10 or DistinctTargets > 5
| extend Severity = "MEDIUM", CVE = "CVE-2026-10520", RuleSource = "SENTINEL-APEX"
| order by TimeGenerated desc
items.suricata_rule: alert http $EXTERNAL_NET any -> $HTTP_SERVERS $HTTP_PORTS (msg:"SENTINEL-APEX CVE-2026-10520 Exploitation Attempt - GENERIC"; flow:established,to_server; content:"|90 90 90 90|"; rawbytes; threshold:type threshold, track by_src, count 3, seconds 60; classtype:web-application-attack; sid:3850935; rev:1; metadata:created_at 2026-06-14, source SENTINEL-APEX-v166.2;)
